zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Molyneux於1368年10月5日出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親William Molyneux11365歲，母親Jane de Holland30歲。他於大約1389年與Ellen DeUrswick結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1397年12月27日在他的家鄉享年29歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Molyneux于1368年10月5日出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲William Molyneux11365岁，母亲Jane de Holland30岁。他于大约1389年与Ellen DeUrswick结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1397年12月27日在他的家乡享年29岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Molyneux was born on 5 October 1368, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, William Molyneux, was 11365 and his mother, Jane de Holland, was 30. He married Ellen DeUrswick about 1389. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 27 December 1397, in his hometown, at the age of 29, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Molyneux est né le 5 octobre 1368, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Molyneux, avait 11365 ans et sa mère, Jane de Holland, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Ellen DeUrswick environ 1389. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 décembre 1397, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Molyneux am 5. Oktober 1368 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Molyneux 11365 und seine Mutter Jane de Holland 30. Er hat um 1389 Ellen DeUrswick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Dezember 1397 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Molyneux è nato il il 5 ottobre 1368 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William Molyneux, aveva 11365 anni e il suo madre, Jane de Holland, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Ellen DeUrswick circa 1389. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 dicembre 1397, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.Canterbury, Kent, England: イギリスケントカンテルブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Molyneuxが1368年10月5日にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父William Molyneuxは11365歳，母Jane de Hollandは30歳であった。約1389年にEllen DeUrswickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年12月27日に故郷で29歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Molyneux(이)가 1368년 10월 5일 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Molyneux(은)는 11365세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane de Holland(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1389년 Ellen DeUrswick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년 12월 27일 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

mn.5 October 1368–27 December 1397: 1368 оны Аравдугаар сарын 5–1397 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 27

pt.5 October 1368–27 December 1397: 5 de outubro de 1368–27 de dezembro de 1397
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Molyneux nasceu em 5 de outubro de 1368, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Molyneux, tinha 11365 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Holland, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen DeUrswick aproximadamente 1389. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1397, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Molyneux родился 5 октября 1368 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Molyneux было 11365 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane de Holland, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen DeUrswick около 1389 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 декабря 1397 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.5 October 1368–27 December 1397: 5 de octubre de 1368–27 de diciembre de 1397
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Molyneux nació el 5 de octubre de 1368, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Molyneux, tenía 11365 años y su mamá, Jane de Holland, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ellen DeUrswick aproximadamente 1389. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1397, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
